---
title: "Thyrotropin Modulates Calcium Handling and Contractility in Adult Cardiac Myocytes"
date: 2025-11-01
author:
  - name: Sepúlveda, Marisa
  - name: Racioppi, Florencia
  - name: Burgos, Juan Ignacio
  - name: Murillo, Alexandra
  - name: Fernandez-Ruocco, Julieta
  - name: Gonano, Luis
  - name: Neiman, Gabriel
  - name: Miriuka, Santiago
  - name: Fellet, Andrea
  - name: Casis, Oscar
  - name: Medei, Emiliano
  - name: Colareda, German
  - name: Vila Petroff, Martín
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Heart, Lung and Circulation"
  volume: 34
  issue: 11
  doi: "10.1016/j.hlc.2025.07.009"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Thyrotropin Modulates Calcium Handling and Contractility in Adult Cardiac Myocytes</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
